message.content:
# QA Analysis: Dark-Theme Web Application Review

## 1. Card Styling Consistency
**Issues:**
- Inconsistent border treatment: The left sidebar categories (User Interfaces, Application Logic, etc.) have subtle borders, but the "EDGE TYPES" section has a more pronounced border
- Inconsistent padding: The "EDGE TYPES" section appears to have slightly different internal padding than the category list above it
- No consistent shadow treatment across components - some elements have subtle shadows while others don't
- The right sidebar metrics (SPOFs, Layers) have a different background treatment than the main content area

## 2. Section Headings and Hierarchy
**Issues:**
- "EDGE TYPES" heading appears to be the same font size and weight as the category names in the left sidebar, reducing visual hierarchy
- No clear distinction between primary (main content) and secondary (sidebar) headings
- The "LANGUAGES" heading at the bottom is cut off, suggesting inconsistent vertical spacing or container sizing
- No clear visual separation between the main graph area and sidebar content

## 3. Interactive Graph Section Quality
**Issues:**
- The graph appears to be the primary interactive element but lacks clear visual focus or highlighting
- No visible hover states or interactive indicators on nodes/edges
- The graph statistics ("64 nodes • 135 edges") are too subtle and could be more prominent
- Color coding in the graph doesn't appear to match the legend in the "EDGE TYPES" section
- No zoom controls or navigation aids visible for the graph

## 4. Overall Visual Polish
**Issues:**
- Inconsistent text color treatment - some text appears brighter than others without clear hierarchy
- The "N" icon in the bottom left corner seems out of place and lacks context
- No consistent spacing between navigation items in the top menu
- The color palette is somewhat muted and could benefit from better contrast
- Some UI elements appear to be slightly misaligned (e.g., the "10 SPOFs" metric)

## 5. Layout Problems
**Issues:**
- The left sidebar appears to be fixed width while the main content area adapts, creating an unbalanced layout
- The "EDGE TYPES" section is cut off at the bottom, suggesting overflow issues
- The right sidebar metrics are too sparse and could be better integrated
- No clear visual flow or grid structure to the overall layout
- The graph area doesn't have clear boundaries or padding from surrounding elements

**Recommendations:**
- Establish consistent card styling with uniform borders, shadows, and padding
- Create clear visual hierarchy with distinct heading treatments
- Improve graph interactivity with hover states and better visual feedback
- Standardize color treatment and spacing throughout
- Fix layout overflow issues and create a more balanced grid structure
- Add more visual polish with consistent typography and spacing
